name: Mendenhall Sourdough Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar and shortening, then beat in.
2. Add molasses and egg, beating continuously.
3. Sift dry ingredients together and blend into hot water.
4. Beat this mixture into the creamed mixture.
5. Slowly add the sourdough starter, mixing carefully to maintain a bubbly batter.
6. Bake in a pan at 375 degrees F for about 30 minutes or until done.
7. Serve with ice cream or whipped cream while still hot if possible.
